output:
All four checks pass.

Implemented `_attach_ruledout(indent, stack, root_tasks)` in `bob_tools/planfile/parser.py:111` — walks the ancestor stack innermost→outermost for the first strictly-less indent, falls back to the most recent root task, returns `None` only when both are empty. Typed against a `_HasIndentLevel` Protocol so it works on both the future frozen `Task` model and any in-parser builder record.

Tests in `bob_tools/planfile/tests/test_parser.py:147` cover: deeper grandchild on the stack is skipped in favor of the strictly-less parent; equal-indent entries are skipped; column-0 RULEDOUT after stack pop falls back to most recent root; empty stack uses root fallback; truly empty state returns `None`.
